title: The Road to Sabaody: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: The boss is such a redneck, Uhehe.

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: I told you to shut up, Tansu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I knew I heard right, Nyu--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Looks like he really resents that guy...

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: That's boss duval to you, octopus boy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: came was captured by the "Strawhat Pirates"!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!! There's no mistake!! He's there!!!
